summary: Language Translation Bug Fix - Fixed DashboardModern.js bottom navigation which had hardcoded English labels instead of using translation function. All translations now working correctly across Dashboard, Sidebar, Daily Rewards, and Tap Game pages for Gujarati, Hindi, and Marathi languages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language translation feature fully working after fix. The issue was in DashboardModern.js which had its own bottom navigation with hardcoded English labels ('Home', 'Rewards', 'Play', 'Profile') instead of using the t() translation function. Fixed by replacing hardcoded labels with t('home'), t('rewards'), t('tapGame'), t('profile'). All 9 languages now translate correctly on all pages.

bug_fix_details.root_cause: DashboardModern.js had its own BottomNavItem component with hardcoded English labels instead of using the global translation function t() from LanguageContext
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Changed label='Home' to label={t('home')}, label='Rewards' to label={t('rewards')}, label='Play' to label={t('tapGame')}, label='Profile' to label={t('profile')}

dashboard_bottom_nav_gujarati.details: Bottom nav shows: હોમ, પુરસ્કાર, ટેપ ગેમ, પ્રોફાઇલ

dashboard_bottom_nav_hindi.details: Bottom nav shows: होम, पुरस्कार, टैप गेम, प्रोफ़ाइल

dashboard_bottom_nav_marathi.details: Bottom nav shows: होम, बक्षिसे, टॅप गेम, प्रोफाइल

sidebar_menu_gujarati.details: All menu items translated: હોમ, પુરસ્કાર, ટેપ ગેમ, માર્કેટપ્લેસ, etc.

sidebar_menu_hindi.details: All menu items translated: होम, पुरस्कार, टैप गेम, मार्केटप्लेस, etc.

daily_rewards_page_gujarati.details: Page title: દૈનિક પુરસ્કાર, all labels translated

daily_rewards_page_marathi.details: Page title: दैनिक बक्षिसे, all labels translated

tap_game_page_gujarati.details: Page title: ટેપ ગેમ, all labels translated

tap_game_page_marathi.details: Page title: टॅप गेम, all labels translated
